blocks.text: Barcelona edge Bilbao — Wednesday's Norwegian football history is three days away
🎾 Indian Wells R2 — Ruud defeats Shevchenko with a clinical straight-sets win, into round three

Wednesday 21:00 is two games in one breath: Bodø/Glimt host Sporting CP at Aspmyra — the biggest CL knockout match ever played on Norwegian soil — while Real Madrid and Man City renew hostilities at the Bernabéu.
